overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a futuristic flying vehicle navigating through a hazy cyberpunk metropolis at dusk. The vehicle transitions from open aerial corridors between skyscrapers into dark enclosed transitways illuminated by neon signage, showcasing high-quality game engine graphics typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

events.description: vehicle banks slightly while descending between tower structures

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle through the hazy cityscape at dusk, maintaining steady altitude between glass skyscrapers

entered.detail: futuristic vehicle interior with angular window frames and metallic surfaces
blue upholstered seats visible on the left side of the cabin
tall modern glass and steel towers with illuminated windows piercing through the haze
thick brownish smog or dust filling the air between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic flying vehicle navigating through a hazy cyberpunk city at dusk. The vehicle flies between massive glass skyscrapers with illuminated windows visible through the smog, while the interior shows blue passenger seats and metallic bulkheads.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered aerial transitway between building structures

events.description: vehicle enters covered transitway structure, blocking sky visibility
executes sharp left turn navigating between close building walls

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through a narrow covered transitway, making a sharp turn between close building structures while transitioning from natural to artificial lighting

entered.detail: concrete and metal walls of the enclosed aerial highway structure
close-up views of building exteriors passing by the vehicle windows

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered aerial transitway, transitioning from the open hazy city to an enclosed corridor. A sharp left turn brings the vehicle close to building facades and transitway walls as artificial lighting begins to dominate the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark enclosed transit tunnel with neon advertisements

events.description: transition to artificial neon lighting as remaining natural light disappears
passing bright pink neon advertisement illuminating the tunnel interior

agents.ego_description: flying through a dark neon-lit corridor, passing various holographic advertisements and maintaining steady course through the enclosed tunnel

entered.detail: large glowing billboards and holographic displays lining the tunnel walls
linear fluorescent lights running along the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a dark enclosed tunnel illuminated by vibrant neon advertisements and overhead lighting. The vehicle maintains a steady course through this narrow corridor, passing colorful holographic billboards including a prominent pink neon display, while the interior cabin remains dimly lit by the external glow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a flying vehicle as it moves from the open, hazy expanse of a cyberpunk skyline into a claustrophobic, neon-lit transit tunnel. It begins by gliding between massive glass skyscrapers at dusk, where the smoggy atmosphere filters the light around blue passenger seats and metallic bulkheads. As the vehicle enters a covered aerial transitway, the open city vanishes, and a sharp left turn brings the camera close to oppressive building facades and artificial walls. The scene then shifts into a dark, enclosed corridor where the natural dusk light is entirely replaced by the glow of vibrant neon advertisements. Finally, the vehicle maintains a steady course through this narrow tunnel, passing colorful holographic billboards and a prominent pink neon display that casts a vivid light into the dimly lit cabin.
